upgrades.name: Punch
upgrades.description: Randomly fling your arms around, hoping that it lands.. which it prob won't.

upgrades.name: Kick
upgrades.description: Sign up for taekwondo classes, Unlocking two extra limbs for combat :)

upgrades.name: Elbow
upgrades.description: Learn how to use your elbows, allowing for even closer attacks.

upgrades.name: Sweep
upgrades.description: Use your legs to make your enemies lose balance and fall.

upgrades.name: Parry
upgrades.description: Parry your enemies' attack, allowing for a chance to reposte.

upgrades.name: Flexibility
upgrades.description: All those conditioning must've made your muscle go stiff. This fixes it!!

upgrades.name: Block
upgrades.description: Block your next attack, thus reducing damage

upgrades.name: Conditioning
upgrades.description: Harden your skin and bones, Making it as though as iron.

upgrades.name: Footwork
upgrades.description: Become more stable, and be less susceptible to enemy attacks.

upgrades.name: Lock
upgrades.description: Lock your enemies, making them unable to move or counter attack. Jiu jitsu style.
